functions.name: command
functions.description: Issue a command.

functions.name: cycle
functions.description: Get the cycle number.

functions.name: deterministic
functions.description: Get the deterministic mode. In deterministic mode, all model runs starting with identical initial conditions result in identical solutions at the cost of a > 20% reduction in performance. In nondeterministic mode, on the other hand, identical initial conditions may lead to divergent solutions. The divergence is due only to the order of summation, and all solutions are equally valid to machine precision.

functions.name: dim
functions.description: Get the code dimensionality.

functions.name: dockWidget
functions.signature: itasca. dockWidget ( window name: string , dock location: string , add close controls: bool ) → Pointer to QDockWidget.
functions.description: Return a pointer to an empty QDockWidget with the specified attributes. One must use shiboken.wrapInstance to access the QDockWidget class through PySide bindings.

functions.name: domain_condition
functions.description: Get the domain condition given a domain direction. Acceptable values are {‘x’ or ‘y’ in 2D; ‘x’, ‘y’ or ‘z’ in 3D}.

functions.name: domain_max
functions.description: Get domain upper bound (vector).

functions.name: domain_max_x
functions.description: Get the x-component of domain upper bound.

functions.name: domain_max_y
functions.description: Get the y-component of domain upper bound.

functions.name: domain_max_z
functions.description: Get the z-component of domain upper bound.

functions.name: domain_min
functions.description: Get domain lower bound (vector).

functions.name: domain_min_x
functions.description: Get the x-component of domain lower bound.

functions.name: domain_min_y
functions.description: Get the y-component of domain lower bound.

functions.name: domain_min_z
functions.description: Get the z-component of domain lower bound.

functions.name: domain_srate
functions.description: Get domain strain rate (vector).

functions.name: domain_srate_x
functions.description: Get the x-component of domain strain rate.

functions.name: domain_srate_y
functions.description: Get the y-component of domain strain rate.

functions.name: domain_srate_z
functions.description: Get the z-component of domain strain rate.

functions.name: fos
functions.description: Get the factor of safety.

functions.name: gravity
functions.description: Get the gravity (vector).

functions.name: gravity_x
functions.description: Get the x-component of the gravity.

functions.name: gravity_y
functions.description: Get the y-component of the gravity.

functions.name: gravity_z
functions.description: Get the z-component of the gravity.

functions.name: mainWindow
functions.description: Get the string pointer address of the QMainWindow.

functions.name: mech_age
functions.description: Return the accumulated mechanical time.

functions.name: remove_callback
functions.signature: itasca. remove_callback ( function_name: str , call_point: float or str ) → None.
functions.description: Remove a python function from the callback system. The first argument is the string name of a function and the second argument can either be a float (which gives the location in the cycling sequence) or a string corresponding to one of the pre-defined callback events.

functions.name: set_callback
functions.signature: itasca. set_callback ( function_name: str , call_point: float or str ) → None.
functions.description: Register a python function to be called during the cycling sequence. The first argument is the string name of a function and the second argument can either be a float (which gives the location in the cycling sequence) or a string corresponding to one of the pre-defined callback events. A function of the given name should exist in the __main__ python namespace and should be callable with any number of arguments.

functions.name: set_deterministic
functions.description: Set the deterministic mode. In deterministic mode, all model runs starting with identical initial conditions result in identical solutions at the cost of a > 20% reduction in performance. In nondeterministic mode, on the other hand, identical initial conditions may lead to divergent solutions. The divergence is due only to the order of summation, and all solutions are equally valid to machine precision.

functions.name: set_domain_condition
functions.signature: itasca. set_domain_condition ( direction: string , condition: string ) → None.
functions.description: Set the domain condition for a given domain direction. Acceptable values of the domain direction are {‘x’ or ‘y’ in 2D; ‘x’, ‘y’ or ‘z’ in 3D}. Acceptable conditions are ‘destroy’, ‘periodic’, ‘reflect’ and ‘stop’.

functions.name: set_domain_max
functions.description: Set domain upper bound (vector).

functions.name: set_domain_max_x
functions.description: Set the x-component of domain upper bound.

functions.name: set_domain_max_y
functions.description: Set the y-component of domain upper bound.

functions.name: set_domain_max_z
functions.description: Set the y-component of domain upper bound.

functions.name: set_domain_min
functions.description: Set domain lower bound (vector).

functions.name: set_domain_min_x
functions.description: Set the x-component of domain lower bound.

functions.name: set_domain_min_y
functions.description: Set the y-component of domain lower bound.

functions.name: set_domain_min_z
functions.description: Set the y-component of domain lower bound.

functions.name: set_domain_srate
functions.description: Set domain strain rate (vector).

functions.name: set_domain_srate_x
functions.description: Set the x-component of domain strain rate.

functions.name: set_domain_srate_y
functions.description: Set the y-component of domain strain rate.

functions.name: set_domain_srate_z
functions.description: Set the y-component of domain strain rate.

functions.name: set_gravity
functions.description: Set the gravity (vector).

functions.name: set_gravity_x
functions.description: Set the x-component of the gravity.

functions.name: set_gravity_y
functions.description: Set the y-component of the gravity.

functions.name: set_gravity_z
functions.description: Set the y-component of the gravity.

functions.name: set_threads
functions.description: Set the number of threads.

functions.name: state_callbacks
functions.signature: itasca. state_callbacks ( ) → dict {any: tuple of str}.
functions.description: Return a dictionary of the currently defined Python new, save and restore callback events. The return value is a dictionary, the keys are the callback points and the values are tuples of Python function names given as strings.

functions.name: threads
functions.description: Get the number of threads.

functions.name: timestep
functions.description: Get the global timestep.
